title: Quick When Shogouki goes berserk is Shinji conscious
display_title: Quick When Shogouki goes berserk is Shinji conscious
wikitext:
[]: Quick: When Shogouki goes berserk, is Shinji conscious?             Quote Post by Shiro » Sun Dec 16, 2007 5:52 pm I've wondered for a while if Shinji is conscious, or at least aware of what's going on when Yui-sama takes over the Eva. Since the camera pulls out of the Entry Plug during a berserk, and specifically in 02, when Shinji is shown again after the berserk, it comes up from black. I wouldn't even ask, but in 02, Sachiel's fight is shown as a flashback. Any official verdict on this?

[]:             Quote Post by jenova7 » Sun Dec 16, 2007 6:14 pm i would assume that Shinji is concious for the beserk incidents with the exception of the 400% synch one. if Asuka was concious during unit 02's fight against the harpies, it would logically follow that Shinji would be aware of whats going on.

[]:             Quote Post by Shiro » Sun Dec 16, 2007 6:17 pm Hm...except Asuka didn't exactly get supplanted in that incident. She was still piloting. Her hand movements mimicked Nigouki's.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Dec 16, 2007 7:15 pm I remember some old, lethal discussions about this. You can try poking around with Search if you haven't. Ornette, is there anything left from ANF on this Eva/pilot crap that should go into the archive?

[]:             Quote Post by V » Sun Dec 16, 2007 7:21 pm I think Shinji is USUALLY not conscious for berserk mode (definately not for Sachiel)...and when he was half-conscious and almost dead from lack of life support from Leliel....outside chance. But no. No, I would say Shinji is never conscious during berserker mode. Quite simply, he never fully realized that Yui's soul was in Eva 01. Meanwhile, Asuka DID realize in EoE that her mother's soul was in Eva 02, watching over her, and thus was able to work hand-in-glove with it (fighting side by side as it were) because she finally realized exactly what was going on.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Dec 16, 2007 7:35 pm V wrote: Quite simply, he never fully realized that Yui's soul was in Eva 01.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sun Dec 16, 2007 7:46 pm Considering that it's the pilot's conscious (or, atleast, I'd assume that) that's used to control the Eva's will, when the Eva takes over I would think that it would be the equivalent of the Eva's conscious (or unconscious) overtaking the pilot's consciousness during Berserk. Now, there are levels of consciousness so it doesn't necessarily have to be either or. Like mentioned above, ep. 19 seems to be a complete pilot/ego dissolution into that of the Eva. For the rest, however, I'd just equate it to the pilot not maintaining conscious control enough to keep the Eva's will at bay.

[]:             Quote Post by Shiro » Sun Dec 16, 2007 7:47 pm I'm going to go with him being unconscious. This has serious ramifications for a 1st Person POV fic, so I had to make sure.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Dec 16, 2007 7:53 pm @Jimbo: You're making Eva piloting sound like a battle of wills or something, which sounds extremely far off the mark. Correct me if I'm wrong.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sun Dec 16, 2007 8:03 pm Not really. The Eva's will seem suppressed to such an extent that as long as the pilot's maintain control they're relatively helpless. Like how we see that Kyoko has no control over Asuka throughout the entire series until EoE. That's why it take some kind of mental trauma on the pilots, some kind of regression, or some kind of other "letting go" to allow the Evas to take over.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Sun Dec 16, 2007 8:09 pm Reichu wrote: V wrote: Quite simply, he never fully realized that Yui's soul was in Eva 01.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Dec 16, 2007 8:32 pm Eva Yojimbo wrote: Not really. The Eva's will seem suppressed to such an extent that as long as the pilot's maintain control they're relatively helpless.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sun Dec 16, 2007 8:40 pm Reichu wrote: My suspicion had always been that the bondage gear (= "restraints") was the thing responsible for that more than anything else.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sun Dec 16, 2007 8:43 pm During the first berserk incident, Shinji went bug-eyed, so he probably went into a faint because of the pain. Sho had her arm snapped and head poked through, and the pain of it would have been enough to take out Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by Shiro » Sun Dec 16, 2007 8:43 pm Yimbo, the fact that Asuka's hand movements mirrored Kyoko's shows that Asuka was in control during that berserk.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sun Dec 16, 2007 8:44 pm Yep, Asuka was in control and both of them were in TOTAL synch with each other. Mama helped when it came to those huge leaps and ATF projections but both moved exactly the same way. Asuka even moves inside the entry plug when Kyoko is balancing herself.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sun Dec 16, 2007 8:51 pm Reichu wrote: Like how we see that Kyoko has no control over Asuka throughout the entire series until EoE.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Dec 16, 2007 8:54 pm BrikHaus wrote: Pet hypotheses aside, was there any actual proof to show that Asuka wasn't in control?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sun Dec 16, 2007 9:02 pm Shiro wrote: Yimbo, the fact that Asuka's hand movements mirrored Kyoko's shows that Asuka was in control during that berserk.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Dec 16, 2007 9:21 pm Eva Yojimbo wrote: Wait.... WHAT? :?
